title: utilities.js — getTimes now zero-pads hours like minutes and seconds
commit_message: fix: pad hours to two digits in getTimes return object

why_standalone_focus.explanation: Only getTimes is modified. CRITICAL selection is the describe('getTimes') block (2 tests). All other describe blocks in standalone/utilities.pure.test.js list sibling symbols in the same file — included as HIGH defensive coverage.
why_standalone_focus.key_point: 2 CRITICAL + 8 HIGH = 10 tests; no cross-dependent or feature suite lists getTimes.

tests.result: ⚠️  MAY FAIL — if test expects hours string '1' instead of '01'

tests.test: getTimes > returns 0 hours when the duration is under 3600 seconds
tests.result: ⚠️  MAY FAIL — if test expects hours '0' vs '00'

HIGH.reason: Same source file utilities.js — sibling symbols (checkNull, checkArray, checkWhiteSpace, getProgressWidth)

tests.test: checkNull > returns an empty string when the value is null
checkNull > returns the original value when it is defined and non-null
checkArray > returns an empty array when the input is null
checkArray > returns the original array when it contains items
checkWhiteSpace > returns true for a string that contains a space
checkWhiteSpace > returns false for a string with no whitespace
getProgressWidth > calculates 50% when value is half of max
getProgressWidth > returns 0 when the value argument is missing or falsy

SKIP.reason: utilities.js not the sole focus of cross-dependent suites for this change policy — or cross suites list multiple sources; selection engine may still pull auth-storage if utilities.js in sources (scenario-dependent). For this narrative, only standalone utilities.pure.test.js is selected.

coverage_gaps.action_required: Update expectations for hours field to use two-digit padding where applicable.
